_comment: Windows version-info resource for guard.exe, compiled to resource_windows.syso by goversioninfo and linked automatically by `go build`. build.ps1 overwrites the version numbers from the repo-root VERSION file, so the values here are just defaults. Giving the unsigned binary a real publisher name + description lowers antivirus heuristic false positives and populates the file's Properties -> Details tab. See docs/signing.md.

StringFileInfo.FileDescription: Extension Guard - browser extension force-install enforcement service
